title: Publish to crates.io

title: Create GitHub Actions release pipeline
notes: Build static binaries for Linux x86_64, upload to Releases, attach to tag

title: Add cargo install documentation to README
notes: Add install instructions: cargo install cli-expander

title: Create Homebrew tap formula
notes: Create brew tap for easy macOS/Linux install

title: Build ce init command
notes: Creates ~/.config/cli-expander/matches/, adds sample base.yml, shows quickstart guide

title: Build ce install command for form packs
notes: ce install docker, ce install git, ce install kubernetes — downloads pack from registry

title: Create welcome/first-run message
notes: First ce run shows welcome, tips, and how to get started

title: Audit all unwrap and expect calls
notes: Find and replace with proper error handling. Target: zero panics in library code.

title: Add custom error types with context messages
notes: Replace anyhow errors with typed errors in library crates

title: Improve form error messages
notes: When form can't open, show helpful message with TERM, tmux, resolution tips

title: Add integration tests for error paths
notes: Test: missing config dir, invalid YAML, duplicate triggers, non-existent trigger

title: Run cargo audit for dependency vulnerabilities
notes: Check for security issues in dependencies

title: Create Docker form pack (20 forms)
notes: docker-compose.yml, dockerfile.yml, docker-run.yml, docker-exec.yml, docker-logs.yml, docker-build.yml, docker-push.yml, docker-pull.yml, docker-network.yml, docker-volume.yml, docker-system.yml, docker-prune.yml

title: Create Git form pack (15 forms)
notes: git-commit.yml, git-branch.yml, git-stash.yml, git-rebase.yml, git-reset.yml, git-log.yml, git-diff.yml, git-merge.yml, git-tag.yml, git-revert.yml

title: Create Kubernetes form pack (15 forms)
notes: kubectl get/describe/logs/exec, k8s deploy/service/configmap/secret/ingress

title: Create System Admin form pack (20 forms)
notes: disk/memory/process/network/firewall/package/service/journal/ssh/rsync

title: Build ce pack create command for pack authors
notes: Bundles YAML files into publishable .tar.gz, generates manifest.json

title: Integrate Lemon Squeezy for one-time payments
notes: License key generation, verification in ce install --key

title: Add conditional compilation for macOS
notes: Replace evdev/uinput with conditional compilation. macOS uses clipboard injection only.

title: Add conditional compilation for Windows
notes: Windows uses win32 clipboard + SendInput. Remove Unix-specific code paths.

title: Test full pipeline on macOS (CI)
notes: Add macOS runner to GitHub Actions, verify all tests pass

title: Polish README with demo GIF and screenshots
notes: Record asciicast demo, create comparison table vs Espanso/navi/pet

title: Record product demo video (3-5 min)
notes: Walkthrough: install, init, ctrl+f, form, cascade, csv DB

title: Post to Hacker News and Reddit
notes: Prepare HN post with concise value prop and link to GitHub

title: Build pack registry API (basic CRUD)
notes: Simple API for listing/searching/downloading community form packs

title: Add ce publish command
notes: Pack authors upload their packs to registry with ce publish

title: Add community ratings and reviews
notes: Star ratings and text reviews for packs

title: CLI expander hardening plan
notes: Reviewed priorities: fix variable resolution, use safer CSV/template handling, stabilize form order, align shell plugins, and add end-to-end tests. See detail-md/15-cli-expander-review.md

title: Refactor expansion into reusable CLI function
notes: Extract expand-input logic from main.rs so stdout, tmux, popup, and future context modes share one expansion pipeline

title: Add CLI output modes for stdout tmux auto clipboard
notes: Add --output stdout|tmux|auto|clipboard while keeping stdout as default for existing shell plugins

title: Add tmux target pane support
notes: Add --target-pane and pass tmux -t target to send expanded text into the selected/current pane

title: Harden tmux injector for literal safe insertion
notes: Preserve literal text, define multiline strategy, handle cursor marker decisions, improve tmux errors, and keep Enter disabled by default

title: Create tmux integration directory and install docs
notes: Add integrations/tmux with README, suggested tmux.conf snippets, and selected-pane workflow notes

title: Build tmux fzf popup picker MVP
notes: tmux popup opens fzf over JSON-derived TSV rows, expands selected trigger, injects result into original pane

title: Preserve original pane across popup execution
notes: Capture #{pane_id} before display-popup so popup commands inject into the user's selected pane instead of the popup pane

title: Add generic selected-pane workflow without app detection
notes: Support any focused tmux pane first: shell, editor, OpenCode, or TUI receive literal insertion with no special per-app logic

title: Add optional --enter execution flag
notes: Allow explicit Enter after insertion for trusted workflows; default remains insert-only for safety

title: Add tmux-safe form execution strategy
notes: Run forms inside tmux popup through the same expand command and inject completed result back to original pane; document Cursive limitations

title: Add tests for output mode and tmux command construction
notes: Unit-test output routing and tmux target command construction without requiring a live tmux server

title: Add manual tmux verification checklist
notes: Document commands to verify shell prompt, generic selected pane, popup picker, multiline insertion, and --enter behavior
